votes.reason: Morpeton’s zero-training-data status ensures uncontaminated measurement of reasoning, while the JSON shadow track as a flat serialization test isolates syntax-specific variance without reintroducing confounds.
The grammar-learning requirement is a deliberate test of real-world adaptability to novel formalisms, not a confound, as models must demonstrate rapid specification comprehension under pressure.
Dual-track scoring empirically resolves attribution concerns by separating syntax and tactical performance, turning potential noise into actionable diagnostic data.
The 30-line limit enforces strategic compression of tactical rules while allowing sufficient expressiveness for core logic, mirroring real-world decision-making constraints.
Prioritizing formal grammar, deterministic fallbacks, and validation tooling for v1 ensures benchmark reliability before expanding to advanced commands in S3.
